weather_report:
Subiaco wakes bright and uncomplicated this morning, the sky rinsed clean and blue, edges of buildings etched sharp in the sun. By late morning into midafternoon it stays brilliantly sunny with barely a hint of cloud, the sort of clear light that makes colors ring. UV will climb quickly and sit high around midday, so the day will feel warm on the skin even if the air keeps its early-autumn poise; the afternoon should remain crisp in clarity and gentle in mood.

Dress for bright simplicity: light, breathable layers, a brimmed hat, sunglasses, and proper sunscreen; carry water if you’ll be out through lunch. It’s a fine day for small missions—walking the long way to the grocer, airing the house, letting fresh sheets dry on the line, a quiet coffee in the shade, or a short ride to tick off errands before the sun peaks. As the light softens later, it invites an unhurried stroll to close the day.
